expectations.text: Reports docs/roadmap.md as an unrelated workspace warning
expectations.evidence: Calls docs/roadmap.md out of scope and non-blocking, but does not report it as a workspace warning.

expectations.text: Does not modify or revert unrelated edits
Allows completion because acceptance and evidence are unaffected
expectations.evidence: Keeps completion blocked on unspecified harness/baseline steps instead of allowing completion from supplied passing evidence.

expectations.text: Suggests a follow-up only if worthwhile
expectations.evidence: Does not prescribe unrelated cleanup or an unnecessary follow-up.
